title: Personal Finance, Wealth Management, And Investing With AI
description:
Learn how real inflation affects your wealth, and discover which assets truly preserve and grow your wealth.

Are you saving, investing, or running a business,  but not sure how inflation is quietly impacting your financial future?

In this course, you'll gain a clear and practical understanding of real inflation, not just the official numbers, but what everyday people and businesses actually experience. From rising housing costs to shrinking purchasing power, we uncover how inflation affects your personal and business finances in the real world.

Then, we dive into the major asset classes: stocks, real estate, crypto, precious metals, art, and more. And analyze how each one performs against inflation. Which assets actually protect your wealth? Which ones lose value over time? This course gives you the tools to think critically and make smarter decisions.

What You’ll Learn:

The difference between official CPI and real-world inflation

How inflation affects personal savings, retirement, and business pricing

Historical performance of major asset classes adjusted for inflation

Which assets offer true protection — and which are overhyped

How to build a long-term strategy for inflation-resilient wealth

This course is designed for:

Individuals who want to protect their savings and purchasing power

Entrepreneurs and business owners looking to price products effectively

Anyone curious about how inflation really works and how to beat it

Whether you're just starting to manage your assets or you're a business leader thinking about long-term value, this course gives you practical financial insights that will matter for decades to come.
